title: Sweet Chewy Mediterranean Baby Squid Stir-fry
description: This sweet and chewy mediterranean dish features baby squid in a sugar-free-friendly sauce that tantalizes the midnight craving.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.amount: a few pinches, optional for heat

instructions: Blanch the baby squid in boiling water for about 3 minutes until they turn bright white. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic, sautéing until softened and translucent.
Add the blanched baby squid to the pan and toss gently with a few red pepper flakes for added flavor if desired.
Pour in the sweet chilli sauce and stir well to coat the squid evenly. Cook for another 2-3 minutes until the sauce is slightly thickened and the squid is cooked through.
Remove from heat and serve immediately, garnished with fresh basil leaves.
